## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Jason Gong (GrowthX) and Afnan Rehan for content editing and quality assurance, particularly for technical writing.](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX needs help with final quality checks on technical content, especially for clients like Strappy (headless CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Afnan has extensive experience in content strategy, editing, and technical writing](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [GrowthX publishes \~80 articles/week; seeking editors to maintain high-quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Potential start date for Afnan: mid-May; rate: $35/hour](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Production Process

  - [Mix of AI and human involvement in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Human-in-loop at various stages: outlining, research verification, feedback, final editing](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Different workflows for various content types (programmatic, listicles, comparisons, editorial)](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Current gap: need for technical expertise in final content review](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Afnan's Background and Experience

  - [Computer Science degree, same university as Usman (GrowthX team member)](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Worked at content agency serving global clients](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Experience with data integration/warehousing software (Astera Data Warehouse Builder)](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Head of Content at HockeyStack, built content team from ground up](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Currently working with WordBrew (AI content production platform) and other tech clients](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

### WordBrew's Expert Network Model

  - [Platform integrates AI content generation with expert review](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [\~400 domain experts available for various tasks (quotes, edits, reviews)](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Task-based pricing model for expert involvement](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Bootstrapped company with mix of full-time and contractual staff](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)

### GrowthX's Editing Needs and Expectations

  - [Focus on maintaining high content quality across various clients](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Need for technical expertise in editing, especially for web dev and security topics](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Flexible approach to editing process, willing to iterate and establish workflow](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Weekly cadence for content publication, aiming for quick turnaround on edits](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

### Potential Collaboration Details

  - [Afnan to send writing samples for review](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Exploring payment options (Deel or Tipalti)](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Afnan's availability: mid to late May start date](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Possibility of recommending other technical writers for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Afnan to send writing samples to Jason](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Jason to confirm payment method and process with team](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Jason to review samples and get back to Afnan](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Potential introduction to another technical writer for GPU cloud content](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Finalize collaboration details and start date if all aligns](https://fathom.video/share/4q32NNs2kYRSqz5MbQ7ZUedP2U5WtKoF?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
